summary.best_response: qwen3-vl-8b-Q8|think (score 7) — correct Pope Francis ID, accurate 广种福 transcription, explicit temple setting; only major error is the Canadian flag guess
summary.worst_response: gemma4-e4b-Q8|think (score 2) — fabricated 涵庭 characters, missed all Shaolin/qigong/temple context, vague flag ID, no altar text
common_errors: 6 of 9 models guess the flag incorrectly: Canadian (3 models: qwen3-vl-8b, qwen3.5-9b both variants), Chinese (2 models: qwen3-vl-4b, qwen3.5-4b nothink), or generic (4 models)
0 of 9 models correctly identify the Austrian flag
Only 1 model (qwen3.5-9b nothink) explicitly mentions Shaolin
0 models mention qigong or yi jin jing specifically
Text hallucination on altar plaque is common: 功德林 (gemma4-12b), 功德無量 (qwen3.5-4b nothink), 大悲 (qwen3-vl-4b)
Only 3 models correctly transcribe the 3-character 广种福: glm-4.6v-flash, qwen3.5-4b think, qwen3.5-9b both, qwen3-vl-8b — others either omit or expand to 广种福田
